productDisplayName: Fila Men's Nexus White Navy Blue Shoe
description: This pair of white lace-up shoes from the Nexus range of fila is designed for utmost comfort and style. Pair it with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and t-shirts to create a stir wherever you go.Uppers Synthetic leather upper for maximum protection and great style White lace-ups for a snug Fit Additonal pair of navy blue laces for a different look Splash patterns on the sides Stripe overlays on the side with stitch detailing for better reinforcement and style Brand name on the side, brand logo on the tongue and embeded behind collar Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comofrt EVA midsole for cushioning and shock resistance Outsole Outsole with a mix of wave and circular patterns for greater grip fila branding on the arch Pivot point on the heel for easy 180 degree movement shoe careDo not machine washWipe with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from sunlight
